fixture.modelExecution: No remote or real model was called; a temporary PATH-precedence codex shim emitted fixed responses while the normal CLI adapter recorded the frozen requested and resolved role labels.
fixture.claimBoundary: This fixture verifies orchestration, model-role provenance wiring, seeded draws, semantic parent-child lineage, nested sealing, checksum-bound packaging, clean-room restore, and read-only report regeneration only. It is not model-quality, state-validity, policy-effect, learning, or provider-attestation evidence.
fixture.archiveAvailability: The bulk archive is a local ignored file. The repository manifest is a checksum pointer and does not transport or publish that archive.

exclusions: model outputs are archived, not regenerated
the manifest points to a local archive and does not transport or publish the archive itself
a successful replay proves job and draw determinism, not deterministic language-model generation
simulated learner outcomes do not estimate human learning effects
